query.description: Temporal Visibility query (e.g. "WorkflowType=\"GreetingWorkflow\" AND ExecutionStatus=\"Failed\""). Empty lists all.

page_size.description: Max executions per page. Defaults to 100, capped at 1000 by the Temporal server.

next_page_token.description: Opaque pagination token returned by a previous list call (base64-encoded). Omit on the first call.
